languages.original_text: "I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"

languages.text: "Не смею перечить. О чем же вы хотели говорить?"
"I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"
languages.original_text: "Не смею перечить. О чем же вы хотели говорить?"

traits.locale_text: "I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"
"I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"
"I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"

languages.text: «No osaría oponerme a sus deseos. ¿De qué quería hablar?».
languages.original_text: "I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"

traits.locale_text: «No osaría oponerme a sus deseos. ¿De qué quería hablar?».

languages.text: “我不敢违逆您的意愿。您希望谈些什么？”
languages.original_text: "I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"

traits.locale_text: “我不敢违逆您的意愿。您希望谈些什么？”

languages.text: « Je n'irai certainement pas à l'encontre de vos souhaits. De quoi vouliez-vous me parler ? »
languages.original_text: "I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"

traits.locale_text: « Je n'irai certainement pas à l'encontre de vos souhaits. De quoi vouliez-vous me parler ? »

languages.text: "Ich werde mich Euren Wünschen nicht widersetzen. Worüber wollt Ihr sprechen?"
languages.original_text: "I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde mich Euren Wünschen nicht widersetzen. Worüber wollt Ihr sprechen?"

languages.text: 「あなたの意向には逆らえません。何を話したかったのですか？」
languages.original_text: "I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの意向には逆らえません。何を話したかったのですか？」

languages.text: "İsteklerinize karşı gelmeye cüret edemem. Ne hakkında konuşmak istiyordunuz?"
languages.original_text: "I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"

traits.locale_text: "İsteklerinize karşı gelmeye cüret edemem. Ne hakkında konuşmak istiyordunuz?"
